## What changed

Describe the user-visible outcome and why the change is needed.

## Verification

- [ ] I ran `python -m unittest discover -s tests -v`.
- [ ] I added or updated tests for changed behavior.
- [ ] I did not commit credentials, personal data, audio, logs, models, or generated builds.
- [ ] I updated privacy or third-party notices if I added a service or dependency.
- [ ] I manually tested relevant microphone or Windows UI behavior, if applicable.
